steps.title: Spot the restatement
steps.content: The first sentence says the researchers determined the ratio of three plant subtypes in pronghorn diets. The second sentence says they determined the relative quantities of the plants consumed. Relative quantities restates ratio in simpler terms.

steps.title: Choose a clarifying transition
steps.content: Choice A would add a separate point, but the second sentence repeats the same idea. Choice B incorrectly suggests a next step in a sequence. Choice C signals contrast, although the two sentences agree. The answer is D.
